records.m_Talk_ENG: Kian! Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kian! Are you all right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kian! Are you all right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine, Miss Morgana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that you saved my life again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that you saved my life again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that you saved my life again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're really grateful, then don't let your guard down when you're alone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're really grateful, then don't let your guard down when you're alone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're really grateful, then don't let your guard down when you're alone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because it'll be my fault if you die on this expedition!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because it'll be my fault if you die on this expedition!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because it'll be my fault if you die on this expedition!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be more careful next time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be more careful next time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be more careful next time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmph.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmph.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what were you doing here all by yourself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what were you doing here all by yourself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what were you doing here all by yourself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found a fine wheel in the warehouse and tried to move it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I found a fine wheel in the warehouse and tried to move it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I found a fine wheel in the warehouse and tried to move it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But then, I saw this glimmer of light from within the snow pile.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But then, I saw this glimmer of light from within the snow pile.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But then, I saw this glimmer of light from within the snow pile.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you say, light?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you say, light?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you say, light?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. So I was trying to dig it out, and then I got surrounded by monsters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. So I was trying to dig it out, and then I got surrounded by monsters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. So I was trying to dig it out, and then I got surrounded by monsters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't see any light around here, Kian.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't see any light around here, Kian.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't see any light around here, Kian.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How odd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How odd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How odd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps this old man's eyes were mistaken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps this old man's eyes were mistaken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps this old man's eyes were mistaken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said it was around here, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said it was around here, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said it was around here, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hand me that shovel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hand me that shovel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hand me that shovel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on, Miss Morgana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think I see something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think I see something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think I see something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! What is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! What is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! What is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A frozen corpse?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A frozen corpse?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A frozen corpse?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is not a corpse. It's faint, but she is still breathing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is not a corpse. It's faint, but she is still breathing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is not a corpse. It's faint, but she is still breathing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! She's still alive after being buried in a place like this?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! She's still alive after being buried in a place like this?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! She's still alive after being buried in a place like this?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't think... that she's a devil disguised as a person, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't think... that she's a devil disguised as a person, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't think... that she's a devil disguised as a person, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't be sure, but from just her looks, she doesn't seem to be a devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't be sure, but from just her looks, she doesn't seem to be a devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't be sure, but from just her looks, she doesn't seem to be a devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I might hurt her, so I'll have to dig her out with my hands!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I might hurt her, so I'll have to dig her out with my hands!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I might hurt her, so I'll have to dig her out with my hands!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kian! Do you have a blanket or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kian! Do you have a blanket or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kian! Do you have a blanket or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just a moment! I'll bring it over!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just a moment! I'll bring it over!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just a moment! I'll bring it over!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's in there deep. How can a person be trapped so deep in the snow?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's in there deep. How can a person be trapped so deep in the snow?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's in there deep. How can a person be trapped so deep in the snow?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Can you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Can you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You just made eye contact with me, right?! Just don't go back to sleep!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You just made eye contact with me, right?! Just don't go back to sleep!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You just made eye contact with me, right?! Just don't go back to sleep!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to pull you out now! So hang on tight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to pull you out now! So hang on tight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to pull you out now! So hang on tight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm warning you! Don't cry if your arm gets dislocated!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm warning you! Don't cry if your arm gets dislocated!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm warning you! Don't cry if your arm gets dislocated!

records.m_Talk_ENG: One, two...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: One, two...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: One, two...!
